data.title: Nordic B2B companies accelerate AI adoption, but caution on risks
data.description: The Nordic Digital Commerce in B2B 2025 report, based on interviews with 920 decision-makers in manufacturing, distribution, and wholesale, found that 24% of companies are already using AI to improve digital operations and customer experience.

data.title: Ohio Peterbilt launches ecommerce for truck parts across the Midwest
data.description: The site redesign also aims to improve usability on desktop and mobile devices, with faster search and streamlined ordering.

data.title: Blue Yonder buys Optoro to expand returns processing
data.description: The purchase of Optoro is Blue Yonder’s sixth acquisition in under two years, part of a broader effort to offer an end-to-end suite of supply chain tools covering planning, fulfillment, and returns.

data.title: Claire's North America business to be acquired out of bankruptcy in private equity deal
data.description: An Ames Watson affiliate agreed to acquisition, which included Claire's intellectual property and stores in North America.

data.title: Lowe’s expands Pro business with $8.8 billion acquisition and more digital tools
data.description: “Our digital initiatives are allowing us to meet pros where they are — on mobile, online, and at the job site — while maintaining strong in-store service,” CEO Marv Ellison said.
